descricao: Processes scraped web content, generates embeddings via OpenAI and stores them in Supabase (pgvector) for semantic search in a chatbot.
problema: The chatbot had no structured access to the website's content, resulting in generic and imprecise answers.
resultado: A vector database populated with real site content, enabling semantic search in the chatbot.
metrica: Vector knowledge base for chatbot RAG
destaques: Separation by content type (card vs. offer)
